name: Suspicious Remote Named Pipe
notes:
This rule detects lateral movement and remote execution scenarios using newly observed named pipes accessed remotely.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Samir Bousseaden
SIGMA Title: First Time Seen Remote Named Pipe
SIGMA Description: This detection excludes known namped pipes accessible remotely and notify on newly observed ones, may help to detect lateral movement and remote exec using named pipes


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
when the event matches Share Name (custom) is any of IPC$

when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(atsvc|samr|lsarpc|lsass|winreg|netlogon|srvsvc|protected_storage|wkssvc|browser|netdfs|svcctl|spoolss|ntsvcs|lsm_api_service|hydralspipe|termsrv_api_service|msftewds|sql\\\\query)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Remote Named Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
AND when the event matches Share Name (custom) is any of IPC$

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '(atsvc|samr|lsarpc|lsass|winreg|netlogon|srvsvc|protected_storage|wkssvc|browser|netdfs|svcctl|spoolss|ntsvcs|lsm_api_service|hydralspipe|termsrv_api_service|msftewds|sql\\\\query)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Remote Named Pipe
Event description: Detects lateral movement and remote execution scenarios using newly observed named pipes accessed remotely.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
